metadata.task_title: Employee Management Workflow Testing in SimpliSalonCloud

content.text: Log in to SimpliSalonCloud at https://simplisaloncloud.vercel.app/login with email 'bartosz.rogala@yahoo.pl' and password 'Tmp!rTC8-OLa'. Navigate to 'Pracownicy' (Employees) in the sidebar. Verify the employee list loads with cards or a table showing employee details. Click the button to add a new employee. Fill in: first name, last name, phone number (9+ digits), email, base salary, commission rate (0-100%), and base threshold. Save and verify the employee appears in the list. Then edit the employee - change the commission rate. Verify the updated value is saved. Try the 'Change Role' feature - click the role button on an employee card and try changing between available roles (e.g., owner, manager, employee, receptionist). Verify the role badge updates. Check if the 'Link Account' feature is available - try to link an employee to a user account by entering an email. Finally, delete an employee and confirm removal. Report any validation errors or UI issues.

Understood! I'll log in to SimpliSalonCloud and systematically test all the employee management features: viewing the list, adding, editing, changing roles, linking accounts, and deleting employees. Let me get started.
Login successful! Landed on the Dashboard for salon "ANASTAZJA". Now navigating to the Pracownicy (Employees) section.
Employee list verified - 8 employees shown as cards with all required details. Now clicking "Dodaj pracownika" to add a new employee.
New employee "Tomasz Kowalski" added successfully and appears in the list with all correct values. Now editing the employee to change the commission rate.
Commission rate updated from 20% to 35% and verified on the card. Now testing the "ZmieÅ rolÄ" (Change Role) feature.

Role changed from "Employee" to "Manager" and badge updated on the card. Available roles are: Owner, Manager, Employee (no Receptionist). Now testing the "PowiÄÅ¼ konto" (Link Account) feature on another employee.
Link Account feature tested - UI issue found: the button provides no feedback (no success/error messages). Now proceeding to delete the test employee "Tomasz Kowalski".

I have completed the full test of the SimpliSalonCloud employee management features. The core functionalities are working, but I have identified two key issues that need attention.

The attached report provides a detailed breakdown of each test case, the steps taken, and the results. The main findings are:

- **"Link Account" Feature is Non-Functional:** The button to link an employee to a user account does not work and provides no feedback to the user.
- **Inconsistent Delete Confirmation:** The application uses a native browser confirmation dialog for deleting an employee, which is inconsistent with the custom UI used elsewhere in the app.

All other features, including adding, editing, and changing roles, passed the tests successfully. Please review the attached report for a comprehensive overview and my recommendations.
